pi_items.source: task.json description specifies save path '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/dovetail_slide.FCStd'; export_result.sh verifies this path at line 10

Manual geometric calculation: Rail is a trapezoidal prism with profile area = 0.5 × (30 + 40) × 10 = 350 mm², extruded 100 mm length, giving volume = 350 × 100 = 35,000 mm³. Matches task description exactly: 'Length: 100 mm (Pad), Profile: Trapezoid, Height=10mm, Bottom Width=30mm, Top Width=40mm'

Manual geometric calculation: Carriage is a rectangular block (60 × 20 × 50 = 60,000 mm³) minus a trapezoidal slot. Slot area = 0.5 × (31 + 41) × 10.5 = 378 mm², slot volume = 378 × 50 = 18,900 mm³. Final volume = 60,000 - 18,900 = 41,100 mm³. Matches task description exactly: 'Length: 50 mm (Pad), Profile: 60x20mm block with slot: Height=10.5mm, Bottom Width=31mm, Top Width=41mm'

Cross-referenced with verifier.py lines 34-35 which confirms tolerance=600 is used for volume validation. Geometrically reasonable margin for CAD modeling/manufacturing tolerance on parts with dimensions in tens of millimeters

task.json description explicitly states: 'You must create a single document containing two separate Bodies: a Rail (male dovetail) and a Carriage (female dovetail slot)'. verifier.py line 67-71 confirms minimum 2 bodies required for success

privileged_info_summary: This is a FreeCAD parametric design task requiring creation of two PartDesign Bodies: a Rail (trapezoidal prism, 100mm × 350mm² = 35,000 mm³) and a Carriage (rectangular block with trapezoidal slot cutout, 60,000 - 18,900 = 41,100 mm³). The 600 mm³ tolerance accommodates modeling precision. Output file must be named 'dovetail_slide.FCStd' in /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/. All geometric parameters are precisely specified to verify correct clearance and mechanical fit of the dovetail mechanism.
